issues.description: OnPlay effect incorrectly uses SearchDeck with destination 'hand'. Card text says 'look at 3 cards...and place them at the top or bottom of the deck' — this is a deck manipulation effect, not a search to hand. Should use a custom action or note that SearchDeck doesn't capture the 'place at top/bottom' mechanic.

Trigger is 'OnAttacked' but card text says '[On Your Opponent's Attack]' — should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack phase), not 'OnAttacked' (when this character is attacked). However, standard DSL uses 'OnAttacked' for 'during opponent's attack'; verify if this is the intended trigger moment.

Action uses 'TrashFromHand' but card text says 'you may trash this Character' — trashing the character itself is a self-trash action, not from hand. Should likely be a custom trash-self action or clarification needed.
Duration is 'EndOfBattle' but card text specifies 'during this battle' — for opponent's turn effects, should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' or similar conditional duration, not a post-battle end state.
